---
name: Research Task
about: Source-based research, comparison, or reproducible investigation.
title: "[RESEARCH] <question or topic>"
labels: research, needs-human-review
---

## Context

<!-- Why this research is needed and which issue, PR, or artifact frames it. -->

## Research Question

<!-- State the main question and any subquestions. -->

## Method

<!-- Describe source selection, comparison criteria, experiments, and limits. -->

## Sources and Evidence

<!-- List required sources, datasets, screenshots, user-provided files, or experiments. -->

## Expected Artifact

<!-- Example: research/<domain>/<topic>.md, bilingual ru/en pair, experiment README. -->

## Language and Publication

- [ ] Russian draft
- [ ] English publication version
- [ ] Bilingual ru/en pair
- [ ] Exception to bilingual policy is documented

## Reproducibility

<!-- Link or describe experiments, commands, datasets, and validation checks. -->

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Research question and method are explicit.
- [ ] Sources, assumptions, and limitations are separated.
- [ ] Related experiments or scripts are linked.
- [ ] Navigation is updated where needed.
- [ ] `./tests/validate-repository-structure.sh` passes if repository structure changes.

## Human Review Focus

<!-- Evidence quality, publication risk, language policy, domain assumptions. -->
